id.label: id
id.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["id"])) : id })()}}

is_active.label: Ativo
is_active.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => ( currentRow.is_active )) :  currentRow.is_active  })()}}

brand.label: Marca
brand.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["brand"])) : brand })()}}

model.label: Modelo
model.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["model"])) : model })()}}

version.label: Versão
version.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["version"])) : version })()}}

model_year.label: Ano Modelo
model_year.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["model_year"])) : model_year })()}}

production_year.label: Ano Produção
production_year.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["production_year"])) : production_year })()}}

is_public.label: Público
is_public.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["is_public"])) : is_public })()}}

spec_count.label: Spec Count
spec_count.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["spec_count"])) : spec_count })()}}

created_at.label: created_at
created_at.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["created_at"])) : created_at })()}}

updated_at.label: updated_at
updated_at.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tbl_products.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["updated_at"])) : updated_at })()}}

actionConfiguration.body:
with selected_product as (
  select *
  from vw_product_value_current
  where product_id = {{ SelectBrand.selectedOptionValue }}
),

price_band as (
  select
    public_price * 0.95 as min_price,
    public_price * 1.05 as max_price
  from selected_product
),

benchmark as (
  select
    max(pv.perceived_value_total) as benchmark_value
  from vw_product_value_current pv
  cross join price_band pb
  where pv.public_price between pb.min_price and pb.max_price
)

select
  sp.product_id,
  sp.product_name,
  sp.public_price,
  sp.perceived_value_total,
  b.benchmark_value,
  round(sp.perceived_value_total / nullif(b.benchmark_value, 0) * 100, 1) as tpva_score
from selected_product sp
cross join benchmark b;

with selected_product as (
  select *
  from vw_product_value_current
  where product_id = {{ SelectBrand.selectedOptionValue }}
),

price_band as (
  select
    public_price * 0.95 as min_price,
    public_price * 1.05 as max_price
  from selected_product
),

products_in_band as (
  select pvc.*
  from vw_product_value_current pvc
  cross join price_band pb
  where pvc.public_price between pb.min_price and pb.max_price
),

category_benchmark as (
  select
    vc.category,
    max(vc.perceived_value) as benchmark_category_value
  from vw_product_value_by_category vc
  join products_in_band pib
    on pib.product_id = vc.product_id
  group by vc.category
)

select
  vc.category,
  case vc.category
    when 'Audio & Conectividade' then 'Áudio & Conectividade'
    when 'Espaco' then 'Espaço'
    when 'Seguranca' then 'Segurança'
    else vc.category
  end as category_label,
  vc.perceived_value,
  cb.benchmark_category_value,
  round(vc.perceived_value / nullif(cb.benchmark_category_value, 0) * 100, 1) as category_score
from vw_product_value_by_category vc
join selected_product sp
  on sp.product_id = vc.product_id
join category_benchmark cb
  on cb.category = vc.category
order by category_score desc, vc.category;

select distinct
  brand
from products
where is_active = true
order by brand;

select distinct
  model as label,
  model as value
from products
where is_active = true
  and brand = '{{ SelectBrand.selectedOptionValue }}'
order by model;

select distinct
  version as label,
  version as value
from products
where is_active = true
  and brand = '{{ SelectBrand.selectedOptionValue }}'
  and model = '{{ SelectModel.selectedOptionValue }}'
  and version is not null
  and trim(version) <> ''
order by version;

select distinct
  model_year as label,
  model_year as value
from products
where is_active = true
  and brand = '{{ SelectBrand.selectedOptionValue }}'
  and model = '{{ SelectModel.selectedOptionValue }}'
  and version = '{{ SelectVersion.selectedOptionValue }}'
order by model_year desc;

select
  id,
  is_active,
  brand,
  model,
  version,
  model_year,
  production_year
from products
order by
  brand,
  model,
  version,
  model_year desc;

SELECT
    p.id,
    p.is_active,
    p.is_public,
    p.brand,
    p.model,
    p.version,
    p.model_year,
    p.production_year,
		p.created_at,
		p.updated_at,
    COUNT(ps.equipment_id)::integer AS spec_count
FROM public.products AS p
LEFT JOIN public.product_specs AS ps
    ON ps.product_id = p.id
WHERE (
        NULLIF(btrim({{ inpProductSearch.text }}::text), '') IS NULL
        OR p.brand ILIKE '%' || btrim({{ inpProductSearch.text }}::text) || '%'
        OR p.model ILIKE '%' || btrim({{ inpProductSearch.text }}::text) || '%'
        OR p.version ILIKE '%' || btrim({{ inpProductSearch.text }}::text) || '%'
        OR p.model_year::text ILIKE '%' || btrim({{ inpProductSearch.text }}::text) || '%'
        OR p.production_year::text ILIKE '%' || btrim({{ inpProductSearch.text }}::text) || '%'
      )
  AND (
        {{ selActiveFilter.selectedOptionValue }}::text = 'all'
        OR p.is_active::text = {{ selActiveFilter.selectedOptionValue }}::text
      )
  AND (
        {{ selPublicFilter.selectedOptionValue }}::text = 'all'
        OR p.is_public::text = {{ selPublicFilter.selectedOptionValue }}::text
      )
GROUP BY
    p.id,
    p.is_active,
    p.is_public,
    p.brand,
    p.model,
    p.version,
    p.model_year,
    p.production_year
ORDER BY
    p.brand,
    p.model,
    p.version,
    p.model_year DESC,
    p.production_year DESC,
    p.id;

SELECT
    p.id,
    p.brand,
    p.model,
    p.version,
    p.model_year,
    p.production_year,
    p.is_active,
    p.is_public,
		p.created_at,
		p.updated_at
FROM public.products AS p
WHERE p.id = {{ appsmith.store.editing_product_id }}::bigint
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE public.products
SET
    brand = {{ inpBrand.text }},
    model = {{ inpModel.text }},
    version = {{ inpVersion.text }},
    model_year = {{ selModelYear.text }}::integer,
    production_year = {{ selProductionYear.text }}::integer,
    is_active = {{ swProductActive.isSwitchedOn }},
    is_public = {{ swProductPublic.isSwitchedOn }},
    updated_at = now()
WHERE id = {{ appsmith.store.editing_product_id }}::bigint
RETURNING *;
